unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Reading and Saving PDFs
drDigitalIntro: PDF is the most common document format — used for forms, statements, manuals, and tickets. Your Mac opens PDFs automatically in Preview app. In Preview, you can highlight text, add notes, fill in forms, and sign documents with your finger or trackpad. To save a webpage as a PDF: File > Print > PDF > Save as PDF. This is great for keeping records of receipts or tickets when you can't print them.

playgroundTask.question: You receive an important bank statement as a PDF. Which app on your Mac opens PDFs automatically?

drDigitalSuccess: Preview is your Mac's built-in PDF viewer — it opens automatically when you double-click a PDF file.
drDigitalHint: Which Mac app is specifically for viewing images and PDF files?
